inverterSourcesNotConfigured: Not configured (set DEYE_* and/or HUAWEI_* on server)
inverterLoadError: No se pudo cargar la lista
huaweiNorthboundRateLimited: Plant list temporarily unavailable (FusionSolar rate limit). Retry in a few minutes; avoid other tools using the same Northbound user.
huaweiAuthFailedHint: FusionSolar login failed (check HUAWEI_USER_NAME and HUAWEI_SYSTEM_CODE on the server).
dischargeGoAria: Run SoC discharge for the selected percentage (selling first, then zero export to CT). May take many minutes.
dischargeSocDeltaAria: Target SoC drop: 2, 10, 20%, or full (~0%). Choice is saved for peak DAM auto-discharge and manual discharge default.
dischargeSoc2Hint: Selling-first until SoC falls by the selected amount (2, 10, 20%, or full toward ~0%), then zero export to CT (rewrites Deye TOU template). May take many minutes.
dischargeSoc2Partial: {{from}}% → {{to}}%. Target SoC was not reached within the server time limit; zero export to CT restored.
dischargeSoc2PartialFlat: {{from}}% → {{to}}%. Cloud SoC did not show a change before the time limit; zero export to CT was restored. The inverter may still be discharging—reported SoC often lags.
dischargeConfirmNoSoc: SoC actual no disponible. Espere a que cargue el valor.
dischargeConfirmInsufficientSoc: No se puede descargar {{delta}}%: SoC actual ({{current}}%) es menor.
chargeGoAria: Run grid-biased charge toward higher SoC (may take many minutes).
chargeSocDeltaAria: Target SoC increase: 2, 10, 20, 50, or 100 percentage points (capped at 100%). Saved for this inverter.
chargeSoc2Hint: Raises battery SoC via dynamicControl (same TOU overwrite as discharge). May take many minutes.
chargeSoc2Partial: {{from}}% → {{to}}%. Target SoC was not reached within the server time limit; zero export to CT restored.
chargeSoc2PartialFlat: {{from}}% → {{to}}%. Cloud SoC did not show a change before the time limit; zero export to CT was restored. Charging may still be in progress—reported SoC often lags.
deyeCommandWaiting: Waiting for Deye. This may take several minutes…
deyeCommandContinuesBackground: The inverter continues until the target SoC is reached, then restores zero export to CT.
deyeWritePinTitlePeak: Enter PIN to change peak DAM discharge
deyeWritePinTitleLow: Enter PIN to change low DAM charge
deyeWritePinTitlePeakPct: Enter PIN to save discharge depth
deyeWritePinTitleLowPct: Enter PIN to save charge depth
deyeRemoteWriteNeedsPin: Remote control is off for this inverter. Add a PIN suffix in the Deye Cloud plant or inverter name (e.g. "My site pin1234"), then reload the list.
chargeConfirmNoSoc: Current battery SoC is not available. Wait for the value to load, then try again.
chargeConfirmNoHeadroom: Not enough room to add that much SoC (already near 100%).
lowDamChargeToggleAria: Server runs charge at the Kyiv clock hour of today’s lowest DAM price; depth is the dropdown value (+10% … +100%). One successful run per day per inverter per low hour; retries after failure.
lowDamChargeToggleHint: Stored on the server (Flyway V9). Low-DAM auto uses the same SoC rise % as the dropdown.
lowDamChargeSaveError: Could not save low-DAM charge preference
peakDamDischargeToggleAria: Server runs SoC discharge at the Kyiv clock hour of today’s DAM peak; depth is the dropdown value (2, 10, or 20%). One successful run per day per inverter per peak hour; retries after failure.
peakDamDischargeToggleHint: Stored on the server (Flyway V6/V7). Peak auto uses the same SoC drop % as the dropdown. Reverse-proxy timeout should exceed the manual discharge duration.
peakDamDischargeSaveError: Could not save peak DAM preference
qrAsideAria: B12 — uncrewed systems unit, b12.army (opens in new tab)
openSourceGithubAria: Código fuente de Open EMS en GitHub (nueva pestaña)
sharePageAria: Compartir enlace a esta página (puerto, idioma, inversor)
sharePageFailed: No se pudo copiar el enlace
powerFlowLandingPeakDamSessionLabel: Exportación Peak DAM — kWh a la red (todas las sesiones)
powerFlowLandingPeakDamSessionHint: Suma de kWh de cada sesión registrada de auto-descarga en pico (desde el inicio hasta zero-export), de todo el tiempo para este inversor.
powerFlowLandingPeakDamSessionSubtitleMi: Parada antes del SoC objetivo (tiempo límite o SoC en la nube plano)
powerFlowLandingManualDischargeLabel: Descarga manual — kWh a la red (todas las sesiones)
powerFlowLandingManualDischargeHint: Suma de kWh de cada sesión registrada de descarga manual desde la UI/API (hasta zero-export), de todo el tiempo para este inversor.
powerFlowLandingManualDischargeSubtitleM: Parada antes del SoC objetivo (tiempo límite o SoC en la nube plano)
powerFlowLandingExportTotalHint: Toda la exportación a la red (kWh) según muestras en BD para este inversor.
powerFlowLandingExportTotalHintFleet: Exportación combinada a la red (kWh) según muestras para todos los inversores.
powerFlowLandingPeakDamSessionHintFleet: Suma de exportación de todas las sesiones peak DAM (todos los inversores, todo el tiempo).
powerFlowLandingManualDischargeHintFleet: Suma de exportación de todas las sesiones manuales UI/API (todos los inversores, todo el tiempo).
powerFlowLandingArbitrageHint: UAH desde muestras en BD: cada 5 min importación kWh × precio horario DAM menos exportación kWh × el mismo precio (día y hora en Kyiv). Suma en intervalos con fila DAM coincidente.
powerFlowLandingArbitrageHintFleet: Flota: el mismo cálculo en todos los inversores.
powerFlowLandingTariffLineLead: Tarifa en {{month}} ~ {{rate}} UAH/kWh con distribución e IVA (
powerFlowLandingTariffPartial: Tarifa en {{month}} ~ {{rate}} UAH/kWh con distribución e IVA
powerFlowLandingTariffUnavailable: Comparación DAM no disponible (falta OREE o datos en la BD).
powerFlowExportHourlyChartTitleTotal: Exportación horaria a la red — últimos {{days}} días calendario de Kyiv (solo horas con exportación)
powerFlowExportHourlyChartTitlePeak: Exportación horaria pico automática — últimos {{days}} días de Kyiv (solo ventanas de sesión peak-DAM)
powerFlowExportHourlyChartTitleManual: Exportación horaria en descarga manual — últimos {{days}} días de Kyiv (solo ventanas de sesión)
powerFlowExportHourlyChartTitleArbitrage: Ingresos por exportación horaria al DAM — últimos {{days}} días de Kyiv (solo horas con exportación)
powerFlowPeakHourlyChartEmpty: No hay exportación a la red en este periodo.
powerFlowPeakHourlyChartError: No se pudo cargar el gráfico.
powerFlowPeakHourlyChartOpenAria: Abrir gráfico de exportación horaria a la red
solarInsolationNoCoords: Set plant location in Deye Cloud for forecast
gridHiddenByInverter: Aggregate grid is hidden while an inverter is selected
evHiddenByInverter: Aggregate EV charging is hidden while an inverter is selected
damEntsoeNotConfigured: ENTSOE_SECURITY_TOKEN is not set — run sync on a server with the token, or prices stay empty.
damLegendAriaToggleUaEntsoe: Show or hide UA (ENTSO-E Transparency) EUR/kWh line
damGridBarsCaption: Grid energy: Import - up, Export - down
damHuaweiDbSamplesHint: No Huawei power samples in the database for this Kyiv calendar day yet. The server saves them periodically when HUAWEI_* is configured, or you can refresh now.
damPvLoadBarsCaption: Gen/Cons energy: Generation - up, Consumption - down
damEnergyTotalsGridAria: Grid import and export totals for the selected calendar day
damEnergyTotalsPvLoadAria: Generation, consumption, and lost solar totals for the selected calendar day
damOreeNotConfigured: OREE_API_KEY is not set — DAM line will be empty until prices are synced on a server with the key.
damSyncNote: DAM prices were just synced from OREE for this view.
damLazyOreeExhausted: On-demand OREE sync for tomorrow reached the server limit. DAM uses the database only until the next scheduled sync or POST /api/dam/sync.
damOreeWebsiteAria: Abre el sitio web de OREE en una pestaña nueva
damOreeEmbedIframeTitle: OREE — mercado diario oficial (DAM) en oree.com.ua
addDeyeMessengerPrefill:
Hola, me gustaría añadir un inversor Deye a Open EMS.

#addDeyeInverter
roiSamplesHint: Need at least two PV samples in the database for this inverter (5-minute snapshots).
roiLoadSamplesHint: Need at least two load (consumption) samples in the database for this inverter (5-minute snapshots) to value energy at DAM when you consume.
roiMissingDamHint: Some energy slices had no DAM price ({{n}} slice(s)); value may be understated.
roiCollectingHint: ROI appears after at least 6 hours from the start date.
roiStackAria: Fuentes ROI: carga kWh · DAM (Kyiv) · PV referencia · otros — marcadores.
roiSetupPinForbidden: PIN rejected or remote control not allowed for this inverter.
addDeyeInstructionTitle: Cómo dar acceso en Deye Cloud
addDeyeInstructionStep1Alt: Abra el menú y pulse Gestionar acceso
addDeyeInstructionStep2Alt: Introduzca un correo y encuentre la cuenta
addDeyeInstructionStep5Alt: Use la búsqueda para encontrar la cuenta más rápido
addDeyeInstructionStep6Alt: Use el menú desde la pantalla principal
selfConsumptionToggleAria: Activado — la batería se descarga libremente para cubrir la carga (ZERO_EXPORT_TO_CT, TOU SoC = 5%). La descarga en hora punta usa el SoC restante.
selfConsumptionToggleHint: La batería cubre primero la carga; la venta en pico usa lo que queda. Almacenado en el servidor (Flyway V21).
selfConsumptionSaveError: No se pudo guardar la preferencia de autoconsumo
seoMetaDescription: Open EMS — open-source EMS for solar, battery storage, and EV charging in Ukraine. Integrates OREE DAM (day-ahead / РДН), intraday (ВДР), and power arbitrage on the integrated power system (IPS / ОЕС). Real-time power flow, Deye and Huawei support.
seoMetaKeywords: Open EMS, EMS Ukraine, DAM, IDM, RDN, VDR, electricity arbitrage, OREE, IPS, integrated power system, day-ahead market, intraday market, Deye inverter, Huawei FusionSolar, smart charging, DER, 220-km
rdnCallbackMessengerHint: Send your request via a messenger — we will call you back.
